name: bun
description: All-in-one JavaScript/TypeScript toolkit: fast runtime, package manager, test runner, and bundler. Use when running bun commands, calling Bun.* APIs, or working with bun.lock projects.

interface.shortDescription: Version-aware skill for the Bun JavaScript runtime, package manager, test runner, and bundler.
interface.longDescription: Bundles a single use-bun skill that uses the ask CLI to pin docs and source to the exact Bun version installed in the project. Covers Bun.serve, Bun.file, Bun.spawn, Bun.$ (shell), bun:sqlite, Bun.SQL, the bun:test runner, the bundler with --compile executables, the package manager with workspaces/catalogs/isolated installs, and Node.js compatibility.
defaultPrompt: How do I start an HTTP server with Bun.serve and routes?
Set up a Bun workspaces monorepo with shared catalog versions.
Write a bun:test suite that mocks a module and snapshots output.
